prerequisites: A DC Data Developers Portal account. Register at https://developers.data.dc.gov before requesting access.
An API key issued from the DC Data Developers Portal, used as the connector's required api_key secret.
Optional: a target location string to search, and/or a MAR ID (marid) to look up a specific Master Address Repository record.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key secret. Obtain the key by registering on the DC Data Developers Portal (developers.data.dc.gov), which hosts the MAR 2 / Open Data DC APIs. For access questions, contact data.dev@dc.gov.

setupSteps.title: Register on the DC Data Developers Portal
setupSteps.body: Go to https://developers.data.dc.gov and create an account using the Register page. This portal hosts the MAR 2 (Master Address Repository) API and related DC Open Data developer resources.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an API key
setupSteps.body: After registering and logging in, request or retrieve your API key from the portal. If you need help with access, contact data.dev@dc.gov.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_key field to the key issued by the portal. This secret authenticates all requests.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional query fields
setupSteps.body: Set location to the address or place you want to search when applicable. Set marid to a specific MAR ID (Master Address Repository identifier) to target a single address record. Both fields are optional.

sources.title: DC's New MAR 2 API for Application Developers - GovDelivery
